def process_items(items):
    for item in items:
        # Violation: loop interleaves core work, logging, and recovery logic
        try:
            logging.info(f"Processing {item.id}")
            result = item.execute()
            db.save(result)
            logging.info(f"Saved {item.id}")
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"Failed {item.id}: {e}")
            db.rollback()
            recovery_queue.put(item)
